name: Richer Rotel Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 oz ROTEL Tomato with Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage.
2. Melt the cheese and stir in the roasted tomatoes with green chili and diced green chilies.
3. Add the chili sauce and continue to stir until everything is well combined.
4. Heat gently and serve with corn chips.
This recipe was contributed by Dorothy Dietz of Schertz, Texas for "Snake, Rattle, and ROTEL".
